caption: A man wearing a grey t-shirt, a grey and white baseball cap with a red and black logo, and large black over-ear headphones is speaking into a professional microphone. He is positioned in a studio setting with dark grey acoustic foam paneling in the background. The microphone is held by a black boom arm and features a pop filter; a label on the arm reads "BoutiqueAudio Model 304A". The man is seen from the chest up, with a tattoo visible on his right upper arm. Across the sequence, the man remains in a nearly identical position, speaking steadily into the microphone with subtle movements of his mouth and head as he talks. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, showing him in a medium close-up shot against the textured studio wall.
